title: TFC Decoration
description: Add new Decorative and functional blocks to TFC.
body:
![TFC Decoration Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121-Mods/TFC-Decoration/1.18/TFC_Decoration_logo.png)

TFC Decoration add new decorative and functional blocks to Terrafirmacraft.

Blocks added in 1.20.1(coming soon) :
- metal supports(works the same way as normal support but have better range)
- vertical wood planks(with stairs and slab)
- colored wood types(with everything that goes with it)
- stone pillar(with walls, slab, stairs)
- rockwool(with walls, slab and stairs)
- cut rockwool(with walls, slab and stairs)

Blocks added in 1.18.2 : 
- colored wood types(with everything that goes with it)
- stone pillar(with walls, slab, stairs)
- rockwool(with walls, slab and stairs)
- cut rockwool(with walls, slab and stairs)

Blocks added in 1.12.2 :
- stone pillar(with walls, slab, stairs)
- rockwool(with walls, slab and stairs)
- sandstone
- sandstone pillar

[![Kinecic Hosting banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121/Branding/master/KineticHosting.png) ](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=540)
